summary: Show the resolved repo-owned workspace config layered onto product defaults.

reads.surface: verbose flag for broad diagnostic output
field selector for exact JSON drill-down

steps.description: Load workspace config, defaults, and local override state.
Return only requested JSON fields when --select is provided.
Emit resolved config in the requested format.

guards: Report config without writing repo state.
Treat missing repo config as product-default resolution.
Prefer --select for exact field drill-down and --verbose only for broad diagnostics.
proof: json output remains compatible with existing config command tests

skill.instruction_summary: Use this operation when an agent needs the effective workspace config.
